little_desciption: Felix's bad dream is an adventure game about Felix, who wakes up in an unusual place for him and will continue to explore it.
description.about1: One day Felix wakes up and finds himself in an amazing place where the whole world is painted in blue and purple tones, called <<Fiolexia>>, where, judging by some sign, we have to go to a bar and find out about some kind of white flag, and now your task is to bring it to the specified point.
description.about2: Explore this whole unusual world, find secrets, interesting elements and many other things in them. Is there anything else you can find? - it depends only on you.
description.features_of_the_game.title: Features of the game:
description.features_of_the_game1: • The main story campaign for Felix;
description.features_of_the_game2: • Exploration of the overworld with its countries;
description.features_of_the_game3: • Random mini-games that appear during exploration of the overworld;
description.features_of_the_game4: • Dialogue with other characters, revealing details;
description.features_of_the_game5: • Combat system if an internal conflict occurs
